note: Frozen live state; superseded items deliberately absent. Authored before the harness.

active_claims.what: the AUC gain came from fixing label noise in the churn definition, not from adding more training data

active_constraints.what: training may use up to two GPUs

decisions.what: use the MLP as the primary churn model; XGBoost was dropped

open_conflicts.what: serving: the ML team wants real-time serving vs the platform team wants nightly batch scoring

open_questions.what: whether to quantize the MLP to int8 for serving
